summary: Navigation responsive fix testing completed. Nav works correctly at 1920px and 1366px with no horizontal overflow. More dropdown opens and navigates correctly. Mobile hamburger menu works at 767px with all items visible. ISSUE FOUND: At 1024px, the More dropdown button overlaps with Demo toggle, causing click interception - More dropdown cannot be clicked.

ui_bugs.issue: At 1024px viewport, More dropdown button (right: 717.75px) overlaps with Demo toggle (left: 678px), causing click interception. More dropdown cannot be opened at this viewport width.

issues: Nav items cramped - 'Dashboard' text partially visible as 'hboard' in some views
More button and Demo toggle overlap causing click issues

passed_tests: Nav fits on 1920px width without horizontal overflow
Nav fits on 1366px width without horizontal overflow
Nav fits on 1024px width without horizontal overflow (no scrollbar)
Nav fits on 767px width without horizontal overflow
Primary nav items visible at 1920px: Dashboard, Leaderboard, Research, Strategy Lab, Alerts
Primary nav items visible at 1366px: Dashboard, Leaderboard, Research, Strategy Lab, Alerts
Primary nav items visible at 1024px: Dashboard, Leaderboard, Research, Strategy Lab, Alerts
More dropdown button visible at 1920px
More dropdown button visible at 1366px
More dropdown button visible at 1024px
More dropdown clickable and opens at 1366px
More dropdown contains overflow items: Simulation, AI Agents, Event Agents, Marketplace, Copy Trading, Following, Referrals, Pricing
More dropdown contains admin items: Admin Panel, Demo Analytics, Traffic
Clicking Traffic in More dropdown navigates to /admin/traffic
More dropdown highlights (bg-white/10) when current page is an overflow item
Mobile hamburger menu appears below md breakpoint (767px)
Mobile menu shows all items including Home, Dashboard, Leaderboard, Research, Strategy Lab, Alerts
Mobile menu shows overflow items: Simulation, AI Agents, Event Agents, Marketplace, Copy Trading, Following, Referrals, Pricing
Mobile menu shows admin items: Admin Panel, Demo Analytics, Traffic
Mobile menu shows Demo Mode toggle
Mobile menu shows Share Demo Link button
Mobile menu navigation works (tested Traffic link)
Demo mode toggle visible on desktop at 1366px and 1920px
PRO badge visible in demo mode
Notification bell visible when authenticated
User dropdown visible when authenticated
User dropdown shows user name, email, Connect Wallet, Sign Out options
Navigation styling consistent with AlphaAI branding (glass effect, rounded, dark theme)
failed_tests: More dropdown NOT clickable at 1024px - Demo toggle intercepts clicks
action_items: FIX: At 1024px viewport, More dropdown overlaps with Demo toggle. Need to adjust responsive breakpoints or hide Demo toggle at smaller widths (e.g., xl:flex instead of lg:flex) to prevent overlap
Consider reducing nav item padding further at 1024px or moving Demo toggle to More dropdown at smaller viewports
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.jsx line 177: Demo toggle uses 'hidden lg:flex' but at 1024px (lg breakpoint) it overlaps with More dropdown
Navigation.jsx line 89: Desktop nav uses 'gap-0.5 lg:gap-1' which may not provide enough spacing at 1024px
Recommend changing Demo toggle to 'hidden xl:flex' (1280px+) to avoid overlap at 1024-1279px range
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation responsive fix mostly working. At 1920px and 1366px, all features work correctly. At 1024px, there's an overlap issue between More dropdown and Demo toggle that prevents More dropdown from being clicked. Mobile menu at 767px works correctly with all items visible. The fix needed is to change Demo toggle from 'hidden lg:flex' to 'hidden xl:flex' to prevent overlap at 1024-1279px range.

1024px.issue: More dropdown overlaps with Demo toggle, click intercepted
